summary: Backend-only testing of inventory chain (manufacturingÔćĺbranch transferÔćĺsaleÔćĺcountÔćĺdeduct) for iteration 210. Built 11 pytest tests covering all 6 requested features. All 11 passed (100%). No data leaks; cleanup verified.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_system.py exceeds 7000 lines ÔÇö should be split into smaller modules (reports, manufacturing, transfers) for maintainability.

branch_stock_count.py /today endpoint: when no manufactured_products in branch_inventory, returns items=[] silently. Acceptable for empty branch but the response also omits prev_count_date when prev_count is None ÔÇö current behavior matches spec.
pending-alerts handles only first 100 open shifts (to_list(100)). For large tenants with >100 simultaneous open shifts this may miss entries; consider pagination or no limit.
seed_data_creation: All seed data prefixed with 'PYTEST-I210' and removed in pytest fixtures (autouse cleanup before+after each test). Verified no residue in manufactured_products, products, branch_inventory, orders, branch_stock_counts, shifts, branches, inventory_movements, users collections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_branch_count_full_iter210.py is the comprehensive regression for the inventory-count chain. It covers: (1) sold_qty decomposition through manufactured_links with unit conversion (ěşěĘěę/ě║ě▒ěž┘ů/┘âě║┘ů); (2) expected_qty=opening+received-sold; (3) empty branch returns 200; (4) submit creates variance, branch_loss inventory_movement, and updates branch_inventory.quantity to actual_qty; (5) /check needs_count/can_close transitions before/after submit; (6) /pending-alerts only lists branches with open shifts AND inventory AND no submitted count; (7) /reports/waste-efficiency RBAC (admin 200 with details[], cashier 403); (8) real branch 76f56acc... regression. Live verification: real branch /today returned items=0 (no manufactured products in branch_inventory), /check returned can_close=true, /pending-alerts returned empty ÔÇö consistent and expected.
rca of the issue: N/A ÔÇö no bugs found. Behavior matches spec including: sold = sum(order_qty * link.consumption_qty converted to manufactured_product.unit), expected = opening + received - sold, variance = expected - actual (positive = loss), branch_loss movement category='manufacturing' so it feeds waste-efficiency report, and pending-alerts gated on open shifts (status=open) so it stays empty when no shifts are open.
